description: Repo-local rule graph for choosing only the harnesses, checks, and guard candidates that fit the current contract.

node_shape.notes: Rules stay file-based and small. They are not a public index, watcher, generated cache, or database-backed retrieval layer.

checks: Related files only
Tests or clear reason not run
Diff evidence
nodes.reason: Code changes need a narrow implementation harness and explicit diff evidence.
nodes.risk: A generic docs or research harness can skip implementation checks.

checks: Reproduced or reason stated
Root cause identified
Regression checked
nodes.reason: Bug fixes should keep reproduction and regression evidence close to the change.
nodes.risk: Skipping reproduction can turn a bug fix into an unverified code edit.

checks: One blocking question at a time
Success conditions explicit before implementation
Assumptions recorded instead of hidden
nodes.reason: Ambiguous ideas should be narrowed into visible requirements before planning or implementation.
nodes.risk: Starting with a generic harness can hide assumptions and choose the wrong next step.

checks: Planner, Architect, Critic, and Final stages represented
Final plan ready for implementation
nodes.reason: Broad planning benefits from a structured critique pass before run state commits to an approach.
nodes.risk: A one-pass plan can miss compatibility, migration, or verification gaps.

checks: .tink/current/goals.json created when selected
Exactly one active goal while work is underway
nodes.reason: Long runs need durable current-run goals with completion evidence.
nodes.risk: A long checklist can lose the active goal, blocked state, or evidence trail.

checks: .tink/current/delegation.md created when selected
No tmux panes, worktrees, or workers started automatically
nodes.reason: Parallel review or handoff should be captured as visible packets before any worker tooling is approved.
nodes.risk: Starting workers before a brief can create overlapping edits or unclear evidence.

checks: CI checks pass or skip reason stated
Rollback documented
Known risks explicit
nodes.reason: Externally visible work needs shipping checks before it is called done.
nodes.risk: A lighter harness can miss rollback, version, or public visibility evidence.

checks: Build artifact produced and recorded
User-target scenarios locked before agents start
No secrets, credentials, or private paths in published files
nodes.reason: Public package releases need isolated install, UX, docs, and leak checks beyond generic ship checks.
nodes.risk: Publishing from local source checks alone can miss package contents or installed-surface drift.

checks: npm pack --dry-run --json
nodes.reason: npm package contents can differ from the working tree and README.
nodes.risk: Users may receive a package missing new docs, templates, or command files.

checks: README commands match shipped CLI/help
nodes.reason: Public docs should not advertise commands or update paths that the shipped package does not provide.
nodes.risk: Users follow stale install or update instructions.

checks: English README and Korean README latest-release guidance stay aligned
nodes.reason: README.md has a Korean companion document that should stay in sync for user-facing changes.
nodes.risk: Korean users can receive stale install, update, or release guidance.

checks: package.json, package-lock.json, .claude-plugin/plugin.json, CHANGELOG.md, and VERSIONING.md agree on the version
nodes.reason: npm and Claude Code plugin update detection depend on aligned version metadata.
nodes.risk: npm latest, GitHub release notes, and Claude Code plugin updates can drift.

checks: commands/*.md, templates/claude/commands/tink/*.md, and .claude/commands/tink/*.md stay byte-identical for matching command names
nodes.reason: Claude Code command sources are maintained in three copies in this repo.
nodes.risk: A fix can work in one surface but not in installed Claude Code commands.

checks: install/update smoke covers changed installer behavior
nodes.reason: Installer changes affect existing users across Claude Code, Codex, macOS, and Windows.
nodes.risk: Local source tests can pass while npx install or update still produces stale surfaces.

checks: Codex-only update removes repo-local .claude/commands/tink/*.md and .claude/skills/tink/SKILL.md when they are generated Tink surfaces
nodes.reason: Codex-only users expect focused $tink:* action skills, not repo-local Claude Code command entries.
nodes.risk: Codex skill picker can show stale Source Command Tink entries after update.

nodes.target: Stop hook blocks release completion when required contract checks are missing
checks: Required contract checks exist before release completion
nodes.reason: Release completion should not be reported without required verification evidence.
nodes.risk: A release can be described as complete without the checks that prove it.

nodes.target: PreToolUse hook blocks writes to contract.forbidden paths
checks: Forbidden path writes are blocked or explicitly approved before execution
nodes.reason: Contract-forbidden paths are high-risk and should not be modified silently.
nodes.risk: A run can mutate files that the user or contract excluded.
